text.title: java-spring Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for java-spring as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: @Transactional on a controller method or on a private service method.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spring AOP proxy cannot intercept controller-layer calls or private methods — the annotation is silently ignored.

failure-mode.description: Self-invocation of @Async method: calling this.sendEmail() from inside the same bean.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The call bypasses the AOP proxy and runs synchronously on the calling thread, ignoring the @Async directive.

failure-mode.description: Service returns JPA entity instead of DTO.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Exposes schema internals, triggers lazy-load exceptions outside @Transactional, and prevents circular-reference handling.
